chains.name: P2P Progression
chains.description: Members milestone route: prerequisite-ordered path through Desert Treasure, Monkey Madness I, Barrows, God Wars Dungeon and Chambers of Xeric. Generated by the progression-router planner (routeMulti over the P2P goal set).

chains.name: Full Corpus (appendix)
chains.description: Every step the system knows about, topo-ordered — the semantic index/appendix. Use the coverage ledger to see which steps already carry detail, highlights, map markers and auto-advance conditions versus which are still stubs to enrich.

chains.name: Quest Progression
chains.description: 215 of 216 routable quests and miniquests (only The Frozen Door's unboostable Hitpoints 70 requirement is out of reach of the current training bank), prereq-ordered by the progression-router planner and interleaved with the skill training each quest actually needs. Wiki-cited throughout.
